mapper.select:
SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.title, o.amount, o.status, o.create_time, customer.name AS customer_name, runner.name AS runner_name, customer.student_id AS customer_student_id, runner.student_id AS runner_student_id, customer.phone AS customer_phone, runner.phone AS runner_phone FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user customer ON o.customer_id = customer.id LEFT JOIN user runner ON o.runner_id = runner.id
AND o.status = #{status}
AND runner.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{runnerName}, '%')
AND customer.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND customer.student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentId}, '%')
ORDER BY o.create_time ASC ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.title, o.amount, o.status, o.pickup_code, o.create_time, o.update_time, customer.name AS customer_name, runner.name AS runner_name, customer.student_id AS customer_student_id, runner.student_id AS runner_student_id, customer.phone AS customer_phone, runner.phone AS runner_phone FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user customer ON o.customer_id = customer.id LEFT JOIN user runner ON o.runner_id = runner.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.title, o.amount, o.status, o.pickup_code, o.create_time, o.update_time, customer.name AS customer_name, runner.name AS runner_name, customer.student_id AS customer_student_id, runner.student_id AS runner_student_id, customer.phone AS customer_phone, runner.phone AS runner_phone FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user customer ON o.customer_id = customer.id LEFT JOIN user runner ON o.runner_id = runner.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND o.customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.title, o.amount, o.status, o.pickup_code, o.create_time, o.update_time, customer.name AS customer_name, runner.name AS runner_name, customer.student_id AS customer_student_id, runner.student_id AS runner_student_id, customer.phone AS customer_phone, runner.phone AS runner_phone FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user customer ON o.customer_id = customer.id LEFT JOIN user runner ON o.runner_id = runner.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND o.runner_id = #{runnerId}
